title: phacelia cumingii var. pusilla
intro: Phacelia cumingii var. pusilla is a plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Phacelia cumingii var. pusilla is often used as a tea or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
